mapper.sql: id, level, reward_points, reward_title, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM level_reward_config WHERE level = #{level} AND enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM level_reward_config WHERE level = #{level} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM level_reward_config WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM level_reward_config WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY level ASC
SELECT FROM level_reward_config WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY level ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE level_reward_config SET level = #{level}, reward_points = #{rewardPoints}, reward_title = #{rewardTitle}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO level_reward_config (level, reward_points, reward_title, description, enabled) VALUES (#{level}, #{rewardPoints}, #{rewardTitle}, #{description}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE level_reward_config SET level = #{level}, reward_points = #{rewardPoints}, reward_title = #{rewardTitle}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, deleted_at = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL
